details: The application has been successfully completed and submitted automatically in full on behalf of Juan Miguel Jaramillo Gaviria. All screening questions, personal details, resume file upload, and custom-drafted cover letter were mapped and processed without manual intervention.

screening_questions.question: Selecciona el nivel de inglés que refleje tu capacidad real para trabajo técnico diario*
screening_questions.answer: C1/C2 (Avanzado/Fluido): lidero discusiones técnicas, argumento decisiones, manejo matices y redacto documentación sin dificultad.

screening_questions.question: ¿Has trabajado de forma remota para clientes internacionales en horario de EE.UU.?*
¿Cuál es tu aspiración salarial mensual en pesos colombianos (COP)?*
Have you shipped LLM/GenAI features to production?*
screening_questions.answer: Yes — multiple production features with measurable outcomes.

screening_questions.question: ¿Tienes experiencia desarrollando integraciones complejas entre sistemas empresariales?*
Marca los servicios AWS que has utilizado directamente (configurar, desarrollar o diagnosticar).*
answer: Lambda: desarrollo, triggers, manejo de errores/timeouts.

screening_questions.question: Python proficiency for production systems*
screening_questions.answer: Advanced — I build production APIs/services confidently.

screening_questions.question: ¿Has trabajado con APIs REST, microservicios y sistemas distribuidos en entornos productivos?*
¿Tienes experiencia práctica con plataformas cloud (AWS, Azure o GCP) y pipelines CI/CD?*

steps_taken: Retrieved candidate information and resume path from candidate_profile_data.json.
Navigated to Remote Rocketship job page at https://www.remoterocketship.com/company/sqdm/jobs/ai-engineer-colombia-remote/.
Located external apply link directing to Teamtailor at https://sqdm.na.teamtailor.com/jobs/649899-ai-engineer.
Opened direct Teamtailor application form page and cleared the cookie consent banner by clicking 'Aceptar todas las cookies'.
Expanded the job application form by clicking 'Enviar solicitud'.
Analyzed the form structures and extracted all 10 custom screening questions and multiple-choice field mappings.
Mapped personal information details (Name, Email, Phone) and checked the 'SQDM Colombia' location option.
Drafted and inserted a tailored cover letter explaining the candidate's deep Generative AI production experience and cloud systems expertise.
Copied resume to the browser-accessible directory and uploaded it directly into the form.
Captured a pre-submit snapshot of the complete and verified form.
Submitted the application successfully, confirming redirect to SQDM's application 'Thanks' page.
Captured a post-submit confirmation screenshot and archived all assets.
